texto: I am frequently asked by people if I would like to be known or remembered for being a Great Poet or a Great Writer. texto: My Prayer? Oh' Lord give me the mind of a warrior that has been taught to fear your name, The soul of a prophet with the tongue and courage to speak truth though I be surrounded by those that despise it and the heart of a boy that believes he can slay a giant

Oh' Lord give me the mind of a warrior that has been taught to fear your name, The sou…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, inspirational-life, prayer, com foco em inspiracao e reflexao.
